---
name: Improvement / feature request
about: Suggest a clarification or addition to the skill
title: "[idea] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What's unclear or missing**
Which part of the skill (a command, a workflow, an error case) is hard to follow
or absent.

**What you'd expect instead**
The wording, example, or section you think would help an agent get it right.

**Anything else**
